_comment: Researched contact emails for nominators/contacts who left the field blank. Applied by src/ingest.py when an asset has no contact_email. Matched (case-insensitive, whitespace-collapsed) against the asset's primary_contact first, then nominator. confidence: 'verified' = found verbatim on an authoritative page; 'inferred' = deduced from the centre's f.lastname@domain pattern + a verified domain — flagged in the dashboard, verify before sending. Do not hand-edit assets.json.

overrides.source: Google Scholar (verified cgiar.org); WorldFish staff profile; ERL 2024 corresponding author
IWMI/WLE CGIAR profile; Google Scholar verified cgiar.org
Google Scholar verified cifor-icraf.org domain + CIFOR-ICRAF f.lastname pattern (alt: e.betemariam@cifor-icraf.org)
Google Scholar verified cgiar.org (CIP) + CIP f.lastname@cgiar.org pattern
Google Scholar verified cgiar.org (CIP, David A. Ramirez Collantes) + CIP pattern
Alliance/CGIAR f.lastname@cgiar.org pattern; affiliation via Google Scholar/ResearchGate (alt: xiaojing.wei@cgiar.org)
